# CalcConvert

> Free online unit converter. Convert length, weight, temperature, area, and speed instantly.

CalcConvert (calcconvert.net) is a free, fast unit conversion tool with no ads or signup required.
All conversions are calculated client-side with no data sent to servers.

## Categories

- **Length**: mm, cm, m, km, in, ft, yd, mi
- **Weight**: mg, g, kg, t, oz, lb, st
- **Temperature**: Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin
- **Area**: mm², cm², m², km², in², ft², acres, hectares
- **Speed**: m/s, km/h, mph, knots

## URL Structure

- Category page: /[category] (e.g. /length)
- Converter page: /[category]/[from]-to-[to] (e.g. /length/cm-to-ft)
- Specific value: /[category]/[from]-to-[to]/[value] (e.g. /length/cm-to-ft/175)

## Popular Conversions

- /length/cm-to-ft — Centimeters to Feet
- /length/km-to-mi — Kilometers to Miles
- /weight/kg-to-lb — Kilograms to Pounds
- /temperature/c-to-f — Celsius to Fahrenheit
- /speed/kph-to-mph — km/h to mph
